# Port target: `eslint-plugin-sonarjs`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/SonarSource/SonarJS |

| Oxlint native support | none â€” port target |

> LGPL-3.0: clean-room only. Do NOT copy source, tests, fixtures, or messages. Behavioral reference via observed output only. The published plugin exposes implementation='original' rules minus 3 source-only assertion rules. 'decorated' (88) and 'external' (169) rules re-use other plugins and are out of scope here.
